zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth DE CREQUY於1149年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯克雷基時，她的父親Raoul III de Créquy29歲，母親Mahaut dite de Poméranie Nevers30歲。她與Chevalier Enguerrand de Brimeu結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1190年在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布利享年41歲。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: CREQUY
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucienne, Renold, Romain.  Spanish Alejandro, Eduardo, Beatriz, Juana, Mario, Porfirio.

Altered form of northern French Crequi: variant of Créquy, a habitational name from Créquy, a place in Pas-de-Calais, so named from Kreko, a personal name of ancient Germanic origin, + the suffix -iacum.

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth DE CREQUY was born in 1149, in Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Raoul III de Créquy, was 29 and her mother, Mahaut dite de Poméranie Nevers, was 30. She married Chevalier Enguerrand de Brimeu. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. She died in 1190, in Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth DE CREQUY est née en 1149, à Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Raoul III de Créquy, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Mahaut dite de Poméranie Nevers, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Chevalier Enguerrand de Brimeu. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée en 1190, à Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth DE CREQUY 1149 in Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Raoul III de Créquy 29 und ihre Mutter Mahaut dite de Poméranie Nevers 30. Sie hat Chevalier Enguerrand de Brimeu geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb 1190 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth DE CREQUY è nata il nel 1149 nel Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Raoul III de Créquy, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Mahaut dite de Poméranie Nevers, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Chevalier Enguerrand de Brimeu. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel 1190, nel Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth DE CREQUYが1149年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスクルeクイで生まれた時，父Raoul III de Créquyは29歳，母Mahaut dite de Poméranie Neversは30歳であった。Chevalier Enguerrand de Brimeuと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1190年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスブリメウックスで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth DE CREQUY(이)가 1149년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 크e크이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Raoul III de Créquy(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mahaut dite de Poméranie Nevers(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 Chevalier Enguerrand de Brimeu(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1190년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 브라임우스에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth DE CREQUY nasceu em 1149, em Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Raoul III de Créquy, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Mahaut dite de Poméranie Nevers, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Chevalier Enguerrand de Brimeu. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1190, em Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth DE CREQUY родилась в 1149 г. в местности крeкуи, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Raoul III de Créquy было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Mahaut dite de Poméranie Nevers, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Chevalier Enguerrand de Brimeu. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла в 1190 г. в местности бримеукс, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth DE CREQUY nació en 1149, en Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Raoul III de Créquy, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Mahaut dite de Poméranie Nevers, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Chevalier Enguerrand de Brimeu. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en 1190, en Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 41 años.
